events.name: Live Music Night
events.description: Catch local artists, meet new people, and enjoy an easygoing night downtown.

events.name: Coffee Meetup
events.description: A casual Saturday morning meetup for coffee lovers and first-time attendees.

events.name: Board Game Social
events.description: Bring your favorite strategy game or join a table and make new friends.

events.name: Sunset Walk Club
events.description: Low-pressure evening walk with conversation starters and scenic city views.

events.name: Indie Film Watch Party
events.description: Watch an indie favorite, talk plot twists, and meet other movie buffs.

events.name: Book & Brunch Circle
events.description: Bring your latest read, share recommendations, and enjoy a relaxed brunch.

events.name: Sunrise Yoga in the Park
events.description: Start the day with a gentle flow session followed by a short community run.

events.name: Photo Walk Downtown
events.description: Explore colorful city spots and trade photography tips while walking together.

events.name: Salsa & Social Night
events.description: A beginner-friendly dance night with icebreakers and upbeat music.

events.name: Startup Makers Meetup
events.description: Talk product ideas, side projects, and entrepreneurship with local builders.

events.name: Thrift & Style Swap
events.description: Refresh your wardrobe, swap pieces, and chat fashion with creative locals.

events.name: Community Sports Mixer
events.description: Join casual pickup games and team challenges for all skill levels.

events.name: Volunteer & Pets Day
events.description: Help out at a local shelter and spend time with adoptable pets afterward.
